(born 25 August 1985) is a [Lithuanian](/wiki/Lithuania "Lithuania") [marathon](/wiki/Marathon "Marathon") and [half marathon](/wiki/Half_marathon "Half marathon") runner. Her marathon personal record is 2:38:48 set at 2008 in [Dresden](/wiki/Dresden "Dresden").

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Lithuanian long-distance runner (born 1985)

Remalda Kergytė-Dauskurdienė

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| Personal information | |
| Born | (1985-08-25) August 25, 1985 (age 40) |
| Height | 1.73 m (5 ft 8 in) |
| Weight | 56 kg (123 lb) |
| Sport | |
| Country | [Lithuania](/wiki/Lithuania "Lithuania") |
| Sport | Athletics |
| Event | [Marathon](/wiki/Marathon "Marathon") |

**Remalda Kergytė** (born 25 August 1985) is a [Lithuanian](/wiki/Lithuania "Lithuania") [marathon](/wiki/Marathon "Marathon") and [half marathon](/wiki/Half_marathon "Half marathon") runner. Her marathon personal record is 2:38:48 set at 2008 in [Dresden](/wiki/Dresden "Dresden").

She represented Lithuania in [2009 World Championships in Athletics](/wiki/2009_World_Championships_in_Athletics "2009 World Championships in Athletics"), reaching 52nd place. At the [2013 World Championships](/wiki/2013_World_Championships_in_Athletics "2013 World Championships in Athletics"), she improved to 30th place.
